parameters.description: Send notifications to your own DingTalk destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise dingtalk:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native DingTalk robot webhook payload directly to oapi.dingtalk.com, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"msgtype":"text","text":{"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}},"at":{"atMobiles":[],"isAtAll":false}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your DingTalk robot webhook (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment DingTalk destinations, direct

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's DingTalk access token
